full_text:
Hu Zun 胡遵
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hu Zun (胡遵). Led the van against Gongsun Yuan then led the van in an invasion of Wu’s Dongxing. Hu Zun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
